column8: Frank"s birthday is on 6th July. Last year, he decided to have a big party for all his friends as it___________his sixteenth birthday. (BE)
column9: In pervious years, his parents had refused to let him have a party, so he_____________very excited when they said yes this time. (FEEL)
column10: "This is going to be the___________party ever!" he told his friend, Charlie. "Will you help me?" (GOOD)
column11: "Sure"__________Charlie, because he liked the idea. So they started planning the party together. (REPLY)
column12: Charlie and Frank had been to lots of_________so they knew what to do. (PARTY)
column13: "What we need is some good music", said Frank. "We've got lots of MP3s, but it would be great if we__________a sound system to play them really loudly" (HAVE)
column14: "That's good idea", Charlie agreed. "My cousin is a DJ, so I'll ask him if he can borrow_________equipment". (HE)
column15: "I______________your cousin was a policeman" Frank said, confused. Charlie told him that he had nineteen cousins. (THINK)
column16: "Oh, yes, your family is much bigger than__________", said Frank. "Just don't invite them all to the party!" (I)
column17: Do you remember the 2012 Olympics? The opening ceremony____________by award-winning film-maker Danny Boyle. (DIRECT)
column18: Not many people expected the ceremony to be very good, despite__________excellent reputation as a director. (HE)
column19: But, in the end, it was very successful. Almost everyone who__________it said it was fantastic. (SEE)
column20: The show_____________by more than 900 million people and lasted for four hours. (WATCH)
column21: Many of the various sections of the show contained lots of___________and young people. (CHILD)
column22: The aim of the ceremony was to give the world a taste of the____________of British culture. (GOOD)
column23: The sections featured everything from the Industrial Revolution to Britain's literary heritage. These showed what the nation had achieved so far in___________history. (IT)
column24: One part of the ceremony appeared to show the Queen parachuting into the stadium. This has helped make her__________than ever. (POPULAR)
column25: Of course, she didn't jump from a helicopter. Everyone___________it was a joke. (KNOW)
